problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Perovskite crystal structure optimization may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
